reviews.originalComment: Cocok untuk yang sekedar tidur doang. Tempatnya nyaman dan bersih. Minusnya kalau disamping ada orang Tidak kedap.
reviews.reviewComments: Suitable for just sleeping. The place is comfortable and clean. The downside is that if there are people next door, it's not soundproof.
reviews.roomTypeName: Bunk Bed in Male Dormitory Room

reviews.reviewComments:
The woman staff was friendly. 
The facilities were excellent.  You can make coffee n tea in the kitchen. 
Just I don't like the honesty ...I booked a room with breakfast which means it's not free breakfast added in the price but when I come they didn't offer breakfast with hundreds alibi. Hey when you offer a room without breakfast then say it no breakfast n no additional cost. 
Better you improve your business than make a lie to the customer. Good I only sleep for a night.
reviews.roomTypeName: Bunk Bed in Male Dormitory Room

reviews.originalComment: Tempat yang bersih, tenang, nyaman, aman 🫰
reviews.reviewComments: A clean, quiet, comfortable, safe place 🫰
